title: NDC Content & Ancillaries
description: Book seats, meals and extra baggage directly in the search results flow — no separate ancillary step needed.
highlights: NDC seat map available for Lufthansa Group and British Airways
Meal preferences saved per passenger profile
Baggage upsell shown inline before payment

title: Search speed improvement
description: Search response time reduced by **40%** thanks to parallel GDS query processing. Amadeus and Sabre results now load simultaneously.

title: Statistics dashboard v2
description: Completely redesigned Statistics module with filterable charts, date range picker and CSV export.
highlights: Export to Excel in one click

title: Fixes: notifications & currency display
description:
Fixed two reported issues:
1. Booking confirmation email sometimes sent in wrong language.
2. Currency symbol displayed incorrectly for CZK/HUF in invoice PDF.
